goal: Plan the V23 canonical workflow JSON and workflow brain upgrade before implementation.

currentSystem.workspaceExport: full WorkspaceSnapshot for recovery and portability
currentSystem.runtimeLite: execution graph with nodes, edges, runs, ContextPacket
currentSystem.artifactVault: generated output persistence and download history

targetSystem.backendRole: eventual contract version persistence alongside existing snapshots

recommendedRounds: R1 repository and report state scan
R2 external and Safari advisory scan
R8 risk register and wall plan
R9 professional report and HTML extension
defer: arbitrary loops and custom code nodes

toolFindings.safariNexus: used as planning critic; useful signal filtered into report
toolFindings.chrome: Chrome running and native host valid; Codex Chrome Extension unavailable in detected profile
toolFindings.supabase: docs search used for JSONB/RLS guidance; no mutation performed
toolFindings.vercel: docs search used for workflow durability guidance; no deployment performed

researchSources.name: LangGraph persistence
researchSources.fitDecision: adopt checkpoint and run-evidence concepts; do not replace runtimeLite

researchSources.name: n8n data flow
researchSources.fitDecision: adopt json/binary packet separation; do not clone n8n workflow format

researchSources.name: React Flow node API
researchSources.fitDecision: use stable UI node/handle concepts under a semantic contract layer

researchSources.name: Vercel Workflows
researchSources.fitDecision: defer as future durable execution infrastructure

researchSources.name: Supabase Row Level Security
researchSources.fitDecision: workflow persistence must be user/workspace-scoped behind RLS

researchSources.name: Supabase JSONB
researchSources.fitDecision: store variable workflow contracts as jsonb later, with relational metadata

researchSources.name: Supabase secure data
researchSources.fitDecision: future workflow persistence must keep RLS and service-role boundaries

researchSources.name: AgentSPEX
researchSources.fitDecision: supports explicit agent workflow specification and modular structure

researchSources.name: GraphFlow
researchSources.fitDecision: supports workflow graph primitives for agentic systems

researchSources.name: Atlassian AI interaction guidelines
researchSources.fitDecision: supports embedding AI assistance into the working surface

researchSources.name: OpenAI prompt engineering
researchSources.fitDecision: supports developer instructions, structured context, examples, and prompt caching
